name: color-tracr
description: Highly performant, ultra-lightweight color marking extension for the editor.

colorTracr.enable.description: Language IDs where Color Tracr is enabled. Use `*` to enable for all, or prepend `!` to explicitly ignore a language (e.g., `!javascript`). Empty means disabled everywhere.

colorTracr.excludePaths.description: Folders and files to ignore during workspace scanning. Uses glob patterns.

colorTracr.showAlpha.description: Whether to render color markers with their parsed transparency. If false, markers will always be fully opaque.

colorTracr.markVariables.description: Mark CSS, SCSS, and LESS variables when they are used. Language IDs to mark. Use `*` to enable for all, or prepend `!` to explicitly ignore a language.

colorTracr.markTailwind.description: Mark Tailwind CSS color classes. Language IDs to mark. Use `*` to enable for all, or prepend `!` to explicitly ignore a language.

colorTracr.matchRgbWithNoFunction.description: Mark raw RGB numbers (e.g., `255, 0, 0`) even when not wrapped in `rgb()`. Language IDs to mark. Use `*` to enable for all.

colorTracr.matchHslWithNoFunction.description: Mark raw HSL numbers (e.g., `255, 100%, 50%`) even when not wrapped in `hsl()`. Language IDs to mark. Use `*` to enable for all.

colorTracr.matchLchWithNoFunction.description: Mark raw LCH numbers (e.g., `60% 40 25`) even when not wrapped in `lch()`. Language IDs to mark. Use `*` to enable for all.

colorTracr.matchOklchWithNoFunction.description: Mark raw OKLCH numbers (e.g., `60% 0.15 25`) even when not wrapped in `oklch()`. Language IDs to mark. Use `*` to enable for all.

colorTracr.useARGB.description: Parse hex codes with alpha as ARGB instead of RGBA (i.e. `#AARRGGBB` and `#ARGB`). Language IDs to mark. Use `*` to enable for all.
